content.en:
Pillar of Eternity!

Ye Tian also knew that this thing was a treasure standing in the depths of the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss, and the Eternal Dao Realm would not dare to approach it, otherwise it would be easy to be transformed into a demon seed.

With the power of the Eternal Demon Pillar, that demon seed can threaten the Eternal Realm God Realm.

This is also the reason why the Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods has not dealt with these demon seeds, and he does not dare to kill these demon seeds.

Of course.

That demon seed didn't dare to come out, without the blessing of the Eternal Demon Pillar, that demon seed couldn't defeat the Eternal Realm God Realm.

Of course, now their purpose now is to clear out some of the demon seeds in the abyss of the number one demon seed.

After all, for a long time, the number of demon seeds in the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss has accumulated more and more, and he doesn't dare to go in to clean it up, so he can only find a way to clean it up now.

"Okay, let's do it!"

The other lords also agreed.

Bi "630" is actually this matter, mainly because the lord of Qinhe has the final say, as long as they don't oppose it.

Subsequently, the lords of the major powers began to formulate battle plans, and it took some time to formulate them.

In short, it is a good thing to deal with the problem of the demon seed in the abyss of the No. 1 Demon Seed, which will contribute to the stability and security of the Alliance of the Kingdom of the Gods.

Otherwise, the real No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss Riot will inevitably affect the other Demon Seed Abyss, and it will also follow the riot.

At that time, the Alliance of the Kingdom of the Ten Thousand Gods will be in trouble, and I am afraid that I will have to ask the Lord of the Great Kingdom of the Ten Gods to return before the problem can be solved.

After the battle agreement was discussed, Ye Tian asked curiously: "Everyone, why is the number of demon seeds increasing so fast? It stands to reason that the probability of the demon seed being killed should be higher than the probability of demon seeding, right?"

At this time, the faces of some lords changed slightly, but they quickly returned to normal.

The Lord of Qinhe said: "Because some of the Eternal Dao Realms are about to transform into Eternal Demon Seeds, they have already settled down, and they are in a dangerous situation, if they destroy the Eternal Dao Seed by themselves, they will definitely die." Therefore, they will choose another path, take the initiative to enter the abyss of the demon seed, choose to self-demonize, and become a demon seed. "

"Why is that? Isn't becoming a demon seed equivalent to death?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

The Lord of Qin He said helplessly: "Because many Eternal Dao Realms firmly believe that demon seed transformation is another path, although the demon seed has almost no spiritual intelligence, but the demon seed in the abyss of the No. 1 Demon Seed has a weak spiritual intelligence. Therefore, they firmly believed that once the demon seed broke through to the Eternal Realm God Realm, it was very likely that spiritual wisdom would be born. Then, it is very likely that his current consciousness has been restored, which is equivalent to another kind of rebirth. Even, this concept has been recognized by many Eternal Dao Realms, so they are willing to give it a go. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

He estimated that all the Eternal Lords present had such thoughts, but they certainly could not say such thoughts.

It is also that Qin He does not have the risk of demon seeding, so it can be said casually, and the strength is strong, and he is not afraid of offending other Eternal Dao realms.

"Okay, that's all for this meeting, let's go and arrange manpower, and in addition, I will also notify other non-national lord-level forces and ask them to arrange some Eternal Dao Realm assistance, and strive to solve the risk of the No. 1 Abyss Movement. "

The Lord of Qin River said.

"Hmm!"

Many lords nodded their heads and left the kingdom of the gods in an instant.

......

The Endless Realm.

Ye Tian began to discuss sending the Eternal Dao Realm to the past, first of all, his son must have to pass, although it will expose his strength, but this time is also an opportunity to sharpen.

In addition, Lin Lei of the human race has also completed the transformation of the Eternal Dao body, and his strength is not weak, and he can also sharpen one or two.

In addition, some of the powerhouses of other forces in the Endless Kingdom who have cultivated the Eternal Dao Seed have to be allowed to go, and the entire Endless Kingdom can probably gather more than a dozen powerhouses who have completed the transformation of the Eternal Dao Body.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian called Ye Xingchen and Lin Lei and informed them of the incident.

Naturally, they were not afraid, and nodded one after another.

After that, the other forces also received Ye Tian's notice, and then immediately went to the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss.

It didn't take long.

One by one, the powerhouses of the Eternal Dao Realm who have completed the transformation of the Eternal Dao Body have arrived here, and among them, there are many Eternal Dao Realm Immortal Dao Realms that have achieved small successes, great completions, and even consummations, and there are very many of them.

When the Eternal Dao Realm was almost here, the Lord of Qinhe took out a treasure, the Cold Heaven Demon Stone.

Of course.

The Lord of the Ancient Kingdom is to let an Eternal Dao Realm enter the No. 6 Demon Seed Abyss with the Cold Heaven Demon Stone in his hand, causing the Demon Seed Rebellion, which is also the easiest way.

However, this time it's to attract some demon seeds out, which is allowed.

If you do this in private, you will definitely not be allowed, and you will be looking for death!

"Everyone, I will activate the power of the Cold Sky Demon Stone later, and when the time comes, many demon seeds will rush out, take the initiative to open the first line of defense, and then between the first line of defense and the second line of defense, they will be destroyed. "

"The demon seed in the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss, which is second only to the Eternal Realm God Realm, may also come out. But it was unlikely that he would come out, after all, he didn't know that the Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods had left, and he definitely didn't dare to take risks. If it really comes out, I and a few half-step Eternal Realm God Realms will make a move to block each other. "

The Lord of Qin River said.

The other Eternal Dao Realms nodded one after another, and they followed the plan of the Qin River Country Lord.

Wow!

The Lord of Qinhe entered the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss, and then quickly activated the ability of the Cold Sky Demon Stone.

Immediately, he left the abyss of the demon seed and came out.

And in the next moment, the breath of the demon seed came.

And there is more than one demon seed, it is the breath of multiple demon seeds, and they all came out of the abyss of the number one demon seed.

"Guys, open the first line of defense!"

The Lord of the Qin River commanded.

Wow!!!!

The first line of defense was withdrawn, and this group of demon seeds broke through the first line of defense one after another and went straight to the second line of defense.

"Shoot!"

A venerable Eternal Supreme Dao Realm has made a move.

Ye Tian, Ye Xing 4.9 Chen, Lin Lei and other powerhouses of the Endless Realm also made a move, and Ye Tian was also paying attention to Ye Xingchen's situation, although Ye Xingchen's strength was also strong enough, second only to the powerhouses of the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm, there were also demon seeds that he couldn't deal with.

Therefore, Ye Tian divided part of his mind and paid attention to his safety.

Thundered!!!!!

A venerable demon seed was killed by many Eternal Supreme Dao Realms, but some Eternal Supreme Dao Realms were severely injured and even killed.

Suddenly.

Lin Lei was knocked away by a powerful demon seed, and at the critical moment, Ye Tian made a move and directly killed the demon seed, saving Lin Lei.

"Thank you Ye Tian Ancestor!"

Lin Lei hurriedly said.

"When you encounter a powerful demon seed, just run away, and fight with the weaker demon seed!"

Ye Tian arraigned.

Lin Lei nodded, indicating that he understood.
